purpose.mission: Guarantee PulseWorld’s persistence through replication, backups, and rapid recovery.
purpose.context: Continuity is law; the canon, ledgers, and identities endure beyond any single node.

architecture.replication_rings: Geographically separated nodes mirror canon, ledgers, configurations via scheduled syncs.
architecture.versioned_backups: Daily incremental + weekly full with cryptographic checksums and immutable retention.
architecture.cold_archives: Quarterly offline snapshots (air-gapped or write-once) for disaster recovery.
architecture.identity_continuity: Spawn IDs and key material backed with rotation and recovery ceremonies.

tier_2_regional.description: Cross-device sync to at least two nodes

operations.verification: SHA-256 checksums; mismatches trigger re-backup and alert.
operations.restore_drills: Monthly recovery rehearsal to a clean node with published reports.
operations.change_control: Canon changes trigger immediate replication and integrity recheck.

safeguards.access_controls: Dual authorization required for restore (Executive + Judiciary or Inspector General).
safeguards.tamper_detection: Hashes and signatures on canon and ledger; anomalies escalate to Defense & Resilience.
safeguards.audit_trail: Append-only logs for backup, verify, restore, and drills.
safeguards.incident_improvement: Post-restore improvement plan mandatory and tracked.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of continuity law with operational metrics and drills.
